hero.headline: Premium Dental Care
hero.subheadline: Where science meets elegance – advanced dentistry in a welcoming environment.

footer.tagline: Premium dental care with a human touch.

about.heading: About Us
about.subtitle: Your trusted dental clinic in Ciudad Quesada, Rojales since 2006.
about.description1: At Arches British Dental Practice, we combine experience, advanced techniques, and a patient-focused approach to deliver exceptional dental care for residents and visitors of Ciudad Quesada and the surrounding Rojales area.
about.description2: As a well-established clinic with a trusted reputation since 2006, we provide gentle, reliable, and professional treatments for patients of all ages. Whether you need routine check-ups, cosmetic improvements, restorative solutions, or urgent dental attention, our team of highly trained professionals is here to help.

services.title: Our Services
services.sub: Twelve treatments, dental and aesthetic, in one continuous arc. Keep scrolling to bring each one forward.

list.name: General Dentistry
list.description: Routine exams and preventive care to keep every smile healthy.

list.name: Dental Implants
list.description: Permanent, natural-looking replacements for missing teeth.

list.name: Dental Cleaning
list.description: Professional plaque and tartar removal for stronger gums.

list.name: Veneers & Crowns
list.description: Custom restorations that protect and perfect your smile.

list.name: Teeth Whitening
list.description: Safe, effective brightening for a noticeably whiter smile.

list.name: Dental Prosthetics
list.description: Bridges and dentures built to restore full function.

list.name: Lip Fillers
list.description: Hyaluronic-acid enhancements for fuller, balanced lips.

list.name: Chin Augmentation
list.description: Contouring treatments that refine facial profile.

list.name: Perioral Wrinkles
list.description: Targeted smoothing for fine lines around the mouth.

list.name: Nasolabial Fold
list.description: Softening the fold lines that run from nose to mouth.

list.name: Hyaluronic Acid
list.description: Versatile fillers for natural volume and hydration.

list.name: Invisible Orthodontics
list.description: Clear aligners that straighten discreetly, at any age.

team.title: GET TO KNOW US
team.subtitle: Your Trusted Dental Clinic in Ciudad Quesada Since 2006
team.description: At Arches British Dental Practice, we are dedicated to providing gentle, high-quality dental care in a friendly and relaxed environment. Since opening our doors in 2006, we have built a strong reputation among residents, seasonal visitors, and holiday-makers across Ciudad Quesada, Rojales, and the surrounding areas. Our mission is simple: to offer professional, honest, and comfortable dental care that puts patients first.
team.meetSubtitle: Dedicated Professionals Committed to Your Smile
